issue_summary: Fix bugs by using instant chronology correctly in add methods
javadoc_before:
/** * Adds this duration into the given mutable instant. *

* To add just once, pass in a scalar of one. To subtract once, pass * in a scalar of minus one. * * @param instant the instant to update with the added duration, must not be null * @param scalar the number of times to add the duration, negative to subtract * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the instant is null * @throws ArithmeticException if the result of the calculation is too large */
javadoc_after:
/** * Adds this duration into the given mutable instant using the chronology of * the specified mutable instant (if present). *

* To add just once, pass in a scalar of one. To subtract once, pass * in a scalar of minus one. * * @param instant the instant to update with the added duration, must not be null * @param scalar the number of times to add the duration, negative to subtract * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the instant is null * @throws ArithmeticException if the result of the calculation is too large */
